# Verity Dexter

First mentioned: **3307-07-13**  
Last mentioned: **3307-07-29**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Verity Dexter is a Marlinist politician who led the Marlinism Reformation Party and ran for prime consul of the Marlinist Consulate in 3307. She promised to speak for the Neo-Marlinist fringe—a position that put her in direct opposition to Kayode Tau of the Free Marlinist Movement. Senator Lorcan Scordato championed her bid and proposed she be recognised as an Imperial patron to represent pro-Marlinist citizens of the Empire. Chancellor Blaine approved the patronage despite protests. Dexter ultimately lost the election to Tau, with her defeat seen as a rejection of NMLA-aligned politics.
